ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "year_month" TEXT /* Date and month of the survey in YYYY-MM-DD format */,
  "survey_organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization conducting the survey */,
  "approve_percent" REAL /* Percentage of respondents approving the topic */,
  "disapprove_percent" REAL /* Percentage of respondents disapproving the topic */,
  "survey_title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method of data collection (e.g., Phone, Online) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents */,
  "geographical_scope" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the survey */,
  "target_population" TEXT /* Target population for the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (e.g., Active, Completed, Draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organization */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organization was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent (e.g., City, State) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Income range of the respondent */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent */,
  "survey_participation_count" INTEGER /* Number of surveys the respondent has participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the response belongs to */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent providing the response */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* The value of the response (e.g., 'Agree', 'Disagree') */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was given */,
  "response_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the respondent in their response (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "response_duration" INTEGER /* Duration taken by the respondent to complete the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey that includes this question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question asked */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response expected (e.g., Multiple Choice, Open-Ended) */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple-choice questions (JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_logs" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the comment */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment provided by the respondent */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., Feedback, Suggestion, Concern) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_logs_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being analyzed */,
  "average_approve" REAL /* Average approval percentage from the survey responses */,
  "average_disapprove" REAL /* Average disapproval percentage from the survey responses */,
  "total_respondents" INTEGER /* Total number of respondents who participated in the survey */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the approval and disapproval percentages */,
  "margin_of_error" TEXT /* Margin of error for the survey results */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_analysis_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Politics, Economy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the survey */,
  "category_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the category for the survey (e.g., importance level) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES survey_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_category_mapping_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_users" (
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the admin user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the admin user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the admin user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the admin user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the admin user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the admin user (e.g., Admin, Analyst, Researcher) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey associated with the change */,
  "admin_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin user making the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Previous value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_analysis" (
  "response_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response analysis record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being analyzed */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being analyzed */,
  "most_common_response" TEXT /* Most common response for the question */,
  "response_count" INTEGER /* Total number of responses for the question */,
  "response_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of responses (JSON object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_analysis_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_analysis_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
